channel.title: Samsung Mobile — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Samsung Mobile (samsung_mobile).

item.title: CVE-2023-42555 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Use of implicit intent for sensitive communication vulnerability in EasySetup prior to version 11.1.13 allows attackers to get the bluetooth address of user device.

item.title: CVE-2023-42554 · 5.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper Authentication vulnerabiity in Samsung Pass prior to version 4.3.00.17 allows physical attackers to bypass authentication.

item.title: CVE-2023-42553 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authorization verification vulnerability in Samsung Email prior to version 6.1.90.4 allows attackers to read sandbox data of email.

item.title: CVE-2023-42552 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Implicit intent hijacking vulnerability in Firewall application prior to versions 12.1.00.24 in Android 11, 13.1.00.16 in Android 12 and 14.1.00.7 in Android 13 allows 3rd party application to tamper the database of Firewall.

item.title: CVE-2023-42551 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Use of implicit intent for sensitive communication vulnerability in startTncActivity in Samsung Account prior to version 14.5.00.7 allows attackers to access arbitrary file with Samsung Account privilege.

item.title: CVE-2023-42550 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Use of implicit intent for sensitive communication vulnerability in startSignIn in Samsung Account prior to version 14.5.00.7 allows attackers to access arbitrary file with Samsung Account privilege.

item.title: CVE-2023-42549 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Use of implicit intent for sensitive communication vulnerability in startNameValidationActivity in Samsung Account prior to version 14.5.00.7 allows attackers to access arbitrary file with Samsung Account privilege.

item.title: CVE-2023-42548 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Use of implicit intent for sensitive communication vulnerability in startMandatoryCheckActivity in Samsung Account prior to version 14.5.00.7 allows attackers to access arbitrary file with Samsung Account privilege.

item.title: CVE-2023-42547 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Use of implicit intent for sensitive communication vulnerability in startEmailValidationActivity in Samsung Account prior to version 14.5.00.7 allows attackers to access arbitrary file with Samsung Account privilege.

item.title: CVE-2023-42546 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Use of implicit intent for sensitive communication vulnerability in startAgreeToDisclaimerActivity in Samsung Account prior to version 14.5.00.7 allows attackers to access arbitrary file with Samsung Account privilege.

item.title: CVE-2023-42545 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Use of implicit intent for sensitive communication vulnerability in Phone prior to versions 12.7.20.12 in Android 11, 13.1.48, 13.5.28 in Android 12, and 14.7.38 in Android 13 allows attackers to access location data.

item.title: CVE-2023-42544 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control vulnerability in Quick Share prior to 13.5.52.0 allows local attacker to access local files.

item.title: CVE-2023-42543 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper verification of intent by broadcast receiver vulnerability in Bixby Voice prior to version 3.3.35.12 allows attackers to access arbitrary data with Bixby Voice privilege.

item.title: CVE-2023-42542 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: Improper access control vulnerability in Samsung Push Service prior to 3.4.10 allows local attackers to get register ID to identify the device.

item.title: CVE-2023-42541 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authorization in PushClientProvider of Samsung Push Service prior to version 3.4.10 allows attacker to access unique id.

item.title: CVE-2023-42540 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control vulnerability in Samsung Account prior to version 14.5.01.1 allows attackers to access sensitive information via implicit intent.

item.title: CVE-2023-42539 · 4.7 MEDIUM
item.description: PendingIntent hijacking vulnerability in ChallengeNotificationManager in Samsung Health prior to version 6.25 allows local attackers to access data.

item.title: CVE-2023-42538 · 5.9 MEDIUM
item.description: An improper input validation in saped_rec_silence in libsaped prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows local attackers to cause out-of-bounds read and write.

item.title: CVE-2023-42537 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: An improper input validation in get_head_crc in libsaped prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows local attackers to cause out-of-bounds read and write.

item.title: CVE-2023-42536 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: An improper input validation in saped_dec in libsaped prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows local attackers to cause out-of-bounds read and write.

item.title: CVE-2023-42535 · 8.4 HIGH
item.description: Out-of-bounds Write in read_block of vold prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-42534 · 6.3 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation vulnerability in ChooserActivity prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows local attackers to read arbitrary files with system privilege.

item.title: CVE-2023-42533 · 6.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper Input Validation with USB Gadget Interface prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows a physical attacker to execute arbitrary code in Kernel.

item.title: CVE-2023-42532 · 5.9 MEDIUM 🌩️
item.description: Improper Certificate Validation in FotaAgent prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release1 allows remote attacker to intercept the network traffic including Firmware information.

item.title: CVE-2023-42531 · 6.2 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control vulnerability in SmsController prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release1 allows local attackers to bypass restrictions on starting activities from the background.

item.title: CVE-2023-42530 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control vulnerability in SecSettings prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows attackers to enable Wi-Fi and Wi-Fi Direct without User Interaction.

item.title: CVE-2023-42529 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Out-of-bound write vulnerability in libsec-ril prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows local attackers to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-42528 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper Input Validation vulnerability in ProcessNvBuffering of libsec-ril prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-42527 · 5.6 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation vulnerability in ProcessWriteFile of libsec-ril prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows local attackers to expose sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2023-30739 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Arbitrary File Descriptor Write vulnerability in libsec-ril prior to SMR Nov-2023 Release 1 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-30738 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: An improper input validation in UEFI Firmware prior to Firmware update Oct-2023 Release in Galaxy Book, Galaxy Book Pro, Galaxy Book Pro 360 and Galaxy Book Odyssey allows local attacker to execute SMM memory corruption.

item.title: CVE-2023-30737 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control vulnerability in Samsung Health prior to version 6.24.3.007 allows attackers to access sensitive information via implicit intent.

item.title: CVE-2023-30736 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authorization in PushMsgReceiver of Samsung Assistant prior to version 8.7.00.1 allows attacker to execute javascript interface. To trigger this vulnerability, user interaction is required.

item.title: CVE-2023-30735 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper Preservation of Permissions vulnerability in SAssistant prior to version 8.7 allows local attackers to access backup data in SAssistant.

item.title: CVE-2023-30734 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control vulnerability in Samsung Health prior to version 6.24.3.007 allows attackers to access sensitive information via implicit intent.

item.title: CVE-2023-30733 · 7.8 HIGH
item.description: Stack-based Buffer Overflow in vulnerability HDCP trustlet prior to SMR Oct-2023 Release 1 allows local privileged attackers to perform code execution.

item.title: CVE-2023-30732 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control in system property prior to SMR Oct-2023 Release 1 allows local attacker to get CPU serial number.

item.title: CVE-2023-30731 · 5.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Logic error in package installation via debugger command prior to SMR Oct-2023 Release 1 allows physical attacker to install an application that has different build type.

item.title: CVE-2023-30727 · 6.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper access control vulnerability in SecSettings prior to SMR Oct-2023 Release 1 allows attackers to enable Wi-Fi and connect arbitrary Wi-Fi without User Interaction.

item.title: CVE-2023-30692 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: Improper input validation vulnerability in Evaluator prior to SMR Oct-2023 Release 1 allows local attackers to launch privileged activities.

item.title: CVE-2023-30690 · 8.5 HIGH
item.description: Improper input validation vulnerability in Duo prior to SMR Oct-2023 Release 1 allows local attackers to launch privileged activities.

item.title: CVE-2023-30730 · 3.3 LOW
item.description: Implicit intent hijacking vulnerability in Camera prior to versions 11.0.16.43 in Android 11, 12.1.00.30, 12.0.07.53, 12.1.03.10 in Android 12, and 13.0.01.43, 13.1.00.83 in Android 13 allows local attacker to access specific file.

item.title: CVE-2023-30729 · 8.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: Improper Certificate Validation in Samsung Email prior to version 6.1.82.0 allows remote attacker to intercept the network traffic including sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2023-30728 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Intent redirection vulnerability in PackageInstallerCHN prior to version 13.1.03.00 allows local attacker to access arbitrary file. This vulnerability requires user interaction.

item.title: CVE-2023-30726 · 4.7 MEDIUM
item.description: PendingIntent hijacking vulnerability in GameLauncher prior to version 4.2.59.5 allows local attackers to access data.

item.title: CVE-2023-30725 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authentication in LocalProvier of Gallery prior to version 14.5.01.2 allows attacker to access the data in content provider.

item.title: CVE-2023-30724 · 4 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper authentication in GallerySearchProvider of Gallery prior to version 14.5.01.2 allows attacker to access search history.

item.title: CVE-2023-30723 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Improper input validation vulnerability in Samsung Health prior to version 6.24.2.011 allows attackers to write arbitrary file with Samsung Health privilege.

item.title: CVE-2023-30722 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: Protection Mechanism Failure in bc_tui trustlet from Samsung Blockchain Keystore prior to version 1.3.13.5 allows local attacker to execute arbitrary code.

item.title: CVE-2023-30721 · 4.4 MEDIUM
item.description: Insertion of sensitive information into log vulnerability in Locksettings prior to SMR Sep-2023 Release 1 allows a privileged local attacker to get lock screen match information from the log.
